_comment: Generic editable preset for the active CrossExtend-KG architecture
_usage: Edit llm and embedding backends first, then adjust variants or domains if needed

seed_descriptions.Asset: industrial asset, machine, line, robot, battery pack, assembly, cabinet, robotic arm, control system, main equipment, battery system, ev vehicle, cnc machine, energy storage system
seed_descriptions.Component: part, module, bearing, reducer, lock, cooling module, hardware component, subassembly part, harness, sensor, motor, controller, actuator
seed_descriptions.Process: industrial process or operational procedure, charging process, diagnostic process, maintenance workflow
seed_descriptions.Task: maintenance or operational task, inspection task, calibration task, shutdown task, work order, repair task, diagnostic task
seed_descriptions.Signal: alarm, warning, telemetry, sensor reading, sensor signal, vibration signal, torque signal, temperature signal, flow signal, isolation resistance reading, voltage reading, current reading
seed_descriptions.State: operating state, normal state, abnormal state, status condition, overload state, shortage status, shutdown state, charging state, fault state
seed_descriptions.Fault: fault, failure, defect, damage, deviation, drift, anomaly root issue, isolation fault, temperature fault, voltage fault, communication fault
seed_descriptions.MaintenanceAction: repair, replacement action, reset action, recalibration action, power-off operation, refueling action, maintenance action, seal repair, harness replacement, component swap
seed_descriptions.Incident: event, abnormal incident, occurrence, fault event, shutdown event, safety incident
seed_descriptions.Actor: technician, operator, engineer, actor, battery service technician, maintenance crew, diagnostic engineer
seed_descriptions.Document: report, ticket, document, manual, work order document, operation log, maintenance manual, isolation test report, diagnostic report

family_descriptions.task_dependency: dependency edges between assets, tasks, and actions

variants.description: Main pipeline with all core modules enabled
